key.name: vendor
key.summary: Vendor to display (anthropic shows the 5h + weekly windows)

key.name: binary-path
key.summary: Absolute path to the ai-usagebar binary (empty = auto-detect on PATH / ~/.cargo/bin)

key.name: bar-width
key.summary: Width of each bar in cells

key.name: show-percent
key.summary: Show the numeric percentage next to each bar

key.name: panel-box
key.summary: Which panel area to live in (right = next to network/clock)

key.name: panel-index
key.summary: Position index within the chosen panel area
